name: Devanshi Chadha
description: Sabarish is an intuitive and intelligent person, who has offered me solutions in the most difficult times and helped me at multiple occasions. He is prompt, hardworking with a knack for technology, and an absolute delight to work with!

name: Keerthana S
description: Sabarish Reddy, a sincere and dedicated professional.Considering his short span of IT experience the way in which he handle the things is always an impressive .He works well in a team environment in which he is always encouraging,open and Sharing the ideas which leads towards the Wipro & Customer Success.He has many times demonstrated his capability to understand the complex business requirements and transfer these into practical solutions.He brings in high energy with him which get contagious in the team and he is always ready to walk that extra mile.I wish him all the best for his future.

name: Caroline Maria
description:
Sabarish is very a committed professional, with great perception to understand the business requirements, delivering fast and effective solutions.

 His proactiveness and lighthearted attitude stand out, making problem solving process much more smooth. I’m sure that with all of his great skills he will be well succeeded in whichever direction his career goes.

name: Adnan Javed
description:
Sabarish, with his limited time in the IT realm, is an excellent IT Professional and technically sound person. His strength in the technical space combined with his knowledge of Business Operations has enabled key contributions to enable Business to act quicker and less dependent on other functions.

For Example: His contribution to the custom tool on Salesforce called "Self Help Portal" has enabled Business to eliminate wait time and dependency for regular User Management activities such as Password Reset or Account Locked out etc.,

Furthermore, this tool had Chat Feature which would help Business chat (on Salesforce) which would translate to IT Support chat via Teams, enabling "Everything On A Single Window" solution to Business.

He would be an amazing fit to almost any team given his learning appetite and hunger to deliver with kindness and gratitude.

name: Thaduri Spoorthi Sri
description: Sabarish and I worked together on Salesforce project, he played an integral role in our team. He has a great way of analysing the issue and fixing it. His ability to overcome challenges with a smile made him stand out above the rest. Altogether his commitment and willingness to work is praiseworthy. I convey my best wishes for his future endeavours.
